UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.listenerPort: Port of the listener to update, integer between 1-65535
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) or "LeastConnection" (least connections)
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSession: Whether to enable session persistence. When enabled and set to false, session persistence will be disabled and keepSessionType, keepSessionTimeout, keepSessionCookieName will be cleared
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSessionType: Cookie handling method for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled. Supports "insert" or "rewrite". Defaults to "insert" when session persistence is first enabled
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSessionTimeout: Cookie expiration time for session persistence (in seconds), valid only when session persistence is enabled. Integer between 1-15552000. Defaults to 3600 when first enabled with keepSessionType "insert"
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSessionCookieName: Cookie name to override for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled and keepSessionType is "rewrite"
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.xForwardedFor: Whether to enable retrieval of the real client IP via the X-Forwarded-For HTTP header on backend servers. Disabled by default
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.xForwardedProto: Whether to enable retrieval of the listener protocol via the X-Forwarded-Proto HTTP header on backend servers. Disabled by default
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.additionalAttributes.gzipJson: Whether to enable gzip JSON compression, string type, value "on" or "off"
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.serverTimeout: Maximum backend server timeout (in seconds), default 30s, integer between 1-3600
UpdateAppBlbHttpListener.redirectPort: Forwards requests received by this listener to an HTTPS listener specified by this port
